Flowers from Erana's Peace: She is a rather motherly-looking woman with a look of vagueness that belies her shrewdness.  She wears an apron over her dress and a scarf wrapped around her head.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 她是一位看起來很像母親的女性，眼神飄渺卻掩不住她的敏銳。她穿著圍裙，頭上綁著頭巾。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: My ring is shaped in gold like a braid of the herb Athelas with entwined leaves.  I will give six golds to the person who returns my ring.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我的戒指是用黃金打造，造型像是艾瑟拉斯草編織的花辮，葉子交織在一起。我會給找到我戒指的人六枚金幣。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I have already given you your reward for the return of my ring.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我已經給過你找到我戒指的獎勵了。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The only place you can get a magic acorn from is a Dryad's oak tree.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「魔力橡果只能從樹精的橡樹上取得。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Poor man, he hasn't been the same since his son and daughter were taken from him.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「可憐的人，自從他的兒子和女兒被帶走後，他就再也不像以前那樣了。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The Trolls around here are tough monsters that cannot stand the light of day and so are found only at night or in caves.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這一帶的巨魔是很難纏的怪物，無法忍受日光，所以只在夜間或山洞裡出沒。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: They are very difficult to kill, but I will pay two healing potions for the beard of a troll.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「它們很難殺死，但我願意為巨魔的鬍鬚付出兩瓶治療藥水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Those brutes!  I'm always having to heal someone they've beaten up and robbed.  I hate thieves.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「那些野獸！我總是要治療被它們毆打和搶劫的人。我討厭小偷。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You can see Spielburg castle from my yard outside.  The Baron lives there with only his guards for company, so I hear.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「從我外面的院子裡能看到史畢柏格城堡。我聽說男爵住在那裡，只有衛兵陪伴。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The Cheetaur looks like a cross between a panther and a man.  It is vicious and tough.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「獵豹人看起來像是黑豹和人類的混合體。它很兇殘且強悍。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Unless you are a very tough fighter, you had best try to get away from it. If you do manage to kill it, then I will pay you five silvers for each claw.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「除非你是很強的戰士，否則最好還是逃跑。如果你真的殺死它，我會為每根爪子付你五枚銀幣。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The dear child, I can still picture her with her beautiful blond hair done up in braids.  She was so sweet.  It is hard to believe she is gone.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「親愛的孩子，我還能想像她那美麗的金色頭髮編成花辮。她那麼溫柔。很難相信她已經不在了。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: If you know the ingredients and then bring them here, I can make you such a potion.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「如果你知道配方的材料並帶來，我可以為你製作這種藥水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I had heard that there was a Dryad in the woods somewhere.  I've never met anyone who actually spoke with her before.  How very interesting.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我聽說森林裡的某處有樹精。我從未遇過真正和她說過話的人。真有意思。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Fairy Dust obviously comes from fairies.  They dance around mushroom rings when it is night.  Fairies are magical beings, so be careful around them.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「妖精粉顯然來自妖精。當夜幕降臨時，她們在蘑菇圈周圍舞蹈。妖精是魔法生物，所以要小心她們。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Would you believe the brigands almost killed him a while back?  Fortunately their leader made them bring Heinrich here where I could heal him.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「你能相信山賊曾幾乎殺死他嗎？幸好他們的首領命令他們把海因里希帶到我這裡，我才能救他。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I will pay you one silver for each empty flask you bring me so I can use it for more potions.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我會為你帶來的每個空藥瓶付一枚銀幣，這樣我就能用它製作更多藥水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I use flowers from Erana's Peace to the north in nearly all my potions. They have some of the magic of the place even when they are dried.  I will pay you five silvers for a flask full of flowers.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我在幾乎所有藥水中都使用北方伊瑞娜的安寧之地的花朵。即使乾燥後，它們仍保有那個地方的魔力。我會為一瓶滿滿的花朵付你五枚銀幣。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I'm not sure what kind of water that is.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我不確定那是什麼水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: A Fairy Ring is a circle of mushrooms.  Fairies dance in them at night, which makes the mushrooms very magical.  Those fairies are cute, but they play rough!
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「妖精環是由蘑菇圍成的圓圈。妖精在夜間在其中舞蹈，使蘑菇充滿魔力。那些妖精很可愛，但她們玩得很粗野！」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I've never heard of a monster around here with green fur.  Rare things are sometimes by their nature magical.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我從未聽說過這裡有綠色毛皮的怪物。稀有物品有時生來就具有魔法性質。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Well, my name is Amelia Appleberry, but mostly I am just known as the Healer.  I will be happy to sell you some potions.  I live here with my pet, Pterry.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「嗯，我叫阿蜜莉亞·蘋果莓，但大多數人都叫我治療師。我很樂意賣你一些藥水。我和我的寵物派瑞住在這裡。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: This potion is used to heal damage and keep wounds from getting worse.  It has gotten pretty dangerous around here, and a Healing Potion can be quite useful in a serious situation.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這種藥水用來治療傷害並防止傷口惡化。這裡變得很危險，治療藥水在危急情況下能派上大用場。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I heard the brigand Leader ordering those nasty men to bring poor Heinrich here after they hurt him so.  I gave them all a good scolding, you can imagine.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我聽到山賊首領下令那些壞傢伙把可憐的海因里希帶到我這裡，在傷害他之後。你可以想像我狠狠地罵了他們一頓。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Power Potions restore the energy needed to cast spells.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「法力藥水恢復施放法術所需的能量。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I have the skill to use my magic to create potions.  I am a bit proud about it; not everyone can do that, you know.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我有用魔法創造藥水的技能。我對此有點自豪；不是每個人都能做到的。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Mandrake root is used in a variety of spells, mostly for evil purposes. Mandrake must be pulled from a dead man's grave at midnight.  The root is particularly powerful.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「曼德拉根用於各種法術，大多是邪惡目的。曼德拉根必須在午夜從死人的墳墓拔起。這種根特別強大。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I need the mushrooms from a fairy ring to make Power Potions.  I will pay you one gold for some.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我需要妖精環的蘑菇來製作法力藥水。我會為你付一枚金幣。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Almost due north of here is the meadow called 'Erana's Peace'.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「幾乎正北方是叫做『伊瑞娜的安寧之地』的草地。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: It is a very magical area and I understand that it is a place of safety.  It is beautiful all year, for the flowers are always in bloom.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這是個非常具有魔法的地方，我聽說那是個安全的地方。它全年都很美麗，因為花朵總是在盛開。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Oh, that's my pet, Pterry, the pterosaur.  He has a girl friend, Pteresa, with a nest in the oak outside my door.  Pterry keeps me company and listens while I chatter as I work.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「哦，那是我的寵物派瑞，一隻翼龍。牠有個女朋友叫派特雷莎，在我門外的橡樹上築巢。派瑞陪伴我，在我工作時聽我唠叨。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I make and sell Healing Potion, Power Potion, Vigor Potion, and Undead Unguent.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我製作和販賣治療藥水、法力藥水、活力藥水和不死藥膏。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: They are a species of flying lizard.  I understand they can grow quite large in the south.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「它們是飛行蜥蜴的一種。我聽說它們在南方能長得相當大。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I will give six golds to the person who returns my ring.  It was a gift when I graduated from the College of Healing.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我會給找到我戒指的人六枚金幣。那是我從治療學院畢業時的禮物。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: My ring is shaped in gold like a braid of the herb Athelas with entwined leaves.  I don't know how I lost it, I hardly ever take it off.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我的戒指是用黃金打造，造型像是艾瑟拉斯草編織的花辮，葉子交織在一起。我不知道怎麼掉的，我幾乎不曾脫下它。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: He was just a young dashing man when he last rode off; he never returned.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「他最後一次騎馬離開時還是個年輕英俊的男人；他再也沒有回來。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I always need ingredients for making potions.  Right now, I need some of Erana's Flowers, Magic Mushrooms, Troll Beard, and, let me think ... Oh, yes, Cheetaur Claws.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我總是需要製作藥水的材料。現在我需要一些伊瑞娜的鮮花、魔法蘑菇、巨魔鬍鬚，讓我想想……哦，對，獵豹人爪子。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I will be happy to pay you if you bring me some.  I'll also buy back any empty flasks you have so that I can recycle them.  Waste not, want not, after all.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「如果你帶一些來，我很樂意付你錢。我也會回購你的空藥瓶，這樣我就能回收利用。畢竟，浪費不得啊。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Floating Spirits are the ghosts which usually hang around graveyards at night.  They are dangerous, so don't go near them unless you use Undead Unguent first.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「漂浮靈魂是通常在夜間在墳墓周圍徘徊的幽靈。它們很危險，所以除非你先使用不死藥膏，否則不要靠近它們。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Stamina is a measure of the energy the body uses as you work or play.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「耐力是衡量你工作或玩樂時身體使用的能量。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Undead Unguent is used to drive off the minor undead such as zombies or floating spirits.  It doesn't last long, so you should use it near where you are going to encounter such things.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「不死藥膏用來驅趕小型不死生物，如喪屍或漂浮靈魂。效果不持久，所以你應該在即將遭遇這些東西的地方使用它。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Vigor Potion is used to revitalize yourself after vigorous exercise.  It helps to restore stamina.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「活力藥水用來在劇烈運動後恢復活力。它有助於恢復耐力。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: There are not too many zombies in this land, too damp, I suppose.  There are some floating spirits, I have heard.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這片土地上沒有太多喪屍，太潮濕了，我想。我聽說有一些漂浮靈魂。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You find that you have less money than you thought, and can't afford to buy a potion.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你發現你的錢比你想的少，買不起藥水。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You'll have to be more specific.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你得說得更清楚一點。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I need all my flasks for potions.  You'll have to get one somewhere else.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我所有的藥瓶都用來做藥水。你得去別的地方拿。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I don't have any.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我沒有。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I hope this will help you.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我希望這對你有幫助。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Please, show some respect.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「拜託，請尊重一下。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you, I always need flasks.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝，我總是需要藥瓶。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Oh, thank you for finding my ring.  How I've missed this.  Here are six golds and two Healing Potions for your reward!
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「哦，謝謝你找到我的戒指。我多麼想念它。這是六枚金幣和兩瓶治療藥水作為你的獎勵！」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: So you helped the Dryad; that's nice.  She does keep the forest around here healthy.  So that's how to make a Dispel Potion, is it?  Thanks for letting me know.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「你幫助了樹精；真好。她確實保持著這一帶的森林健康。所以這就是製作解除魔法藥水的方法嗎？謝謝你讓我知道。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I wouldn't know what to do with that.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我不知道拿這個怎麼辦。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you, but I have all the flowers I need.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝，但我已經有我需要的所有鮮花。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you.  I can always use flowers from Erana's Peace in potion making. Here are your silvers.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝。我總是能在製作藥水時用上伊瑞娜的安寧之地的花朵。這是你的銀幣。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You put them away.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你把它們收起來。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you.  I'll save this for a later use.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝。我會存起來以後用。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Those Meeps sound so interesting.  I'd like to meet them sometime.  I'll get to work on that potion of yours.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「那些咪普聽起來很有趣。我想有機會見見它們。我來開始製作你的藥水吧。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: So, you say this is one of the ingredients for the Dispel Potion.  Well, I had better get started making it.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「所以，你說這是解除魔法藥水的一種材料。好吧，我最好開始製作它。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you.  I'm sure that I'll find a good use for Fairy Dust.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝。我相信我會找到妖精粉的好用途。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I don't need any more Flying Water.  Thank you anyway.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我不需要更多飛水了。不過還是謝謝。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you for the offer, but I really don't need any water.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝你的提議，但我真的不需要任何水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The Healer makes some sort of arcane gesture over the flask of water, then looks surprised.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 治療師對著水瓶做出某種奧祕的手勢，然後看起來很驚訝。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I'm sorry, but this water does not seem to have any magical potential at all.  This can't be the `Flying Water' you described.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「抱歉，但這水似乎完全沒有任何魔法潛力。這不可能是你描述的『飛水』。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The Healer makes some sort of arcane gesture over the flask of water, then smiles.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 治療師對著水瓶做出某種奧祕的手勢，然後微笑。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Flying Water.  How clever.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「飛水。真聰明。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Thank you, but I have enough mushrooms.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「謝謝，但我已經有足夠的蘑菇。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: These are very nice.  I'll dry them and grind them into a powder.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這些很不錯。我會把它們曬乾然後研成粉末。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Let me think, oh yes, I said these are worth a gold.  Here you are.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「讓我想想，哦是的，我說過這些值一枚金幣。給你。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You put it away.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你把它收起來。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You have ruined the mushrooms with toadstools.  I can not buy your mushrooms.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「你用毒菌毀了蘑菇。我不能買你的蘑菇。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Do you mean to tell me that you actually managed to kill a Cheetaur?  You're quite a hero, aren't you?
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「你是在告訴我你真的殺死了獵豹人？你真是個英雄啊？」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Here is your money. You might think about purchasing a Healing Potion in case you have to fight such monsters again.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這是你的錢。你可能要考慮買一瓶治療藥水，以防你得再次對付這樣的怪物。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Don't tell me you actually killed a Troll?  Why, you are really amazing. I haven't had any Troll's Beard for a long time.  There are two healing potions for the beard.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「別告訴我你真的殺死了巨魔？天哪，你真是太了不起了。我很久沒有得到巨魔的鬍鬚了。鬍鬚有兩瓶治療藥水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: They are ingredients the healer uses to make her potions.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 它們是治療師用來製作藥水的材料。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Soup is good for you.  Mmmm Mmmm good.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 湯對你很好。嗯嗯嗯真好。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: It's not your soup.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 這不是你的湯。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: It's a ladder up to the loft where the Healer has her personal quarters.  No, you can't go up the ladder.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 這是通向治療師個人房間的閣樓樓梯。不，你不能上樓梯。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Don't be nosy.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 別多管閒事。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The pterosaur's litter box.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 翼龍的貓砂盆。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Amelia uses a wide variety of pots to make her magical potions.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 阿蜜莉亞用各種各樣的鍋來製作她的魔法藥水。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Do you want to burn yourself?  Those pots are hot!
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你想燙到自己嗎？那些鍋很燙！

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You see a winged lizard much like the one you saw outside.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你看到一隻翼龍，很像你在外面看到的那隻。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Small on a prehistoric scale, but still a pterosaur.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 按史前標準來說很小，但仍然是翼龍。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: I cannot make you another Dispel Potion unless you can convince the Dryad to give you another magic acorn.  I do not think that is likely.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「除非你能說服樹精給你另一個魔力橡果，否則我無法為你製作另一瓶解除魔法藥水。我不認為那可能。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You tell the healer that you have been to visit the Dryad of the Woods, and that she gave you a Magic Acorn and told you the formula for a potion to dispel enchantments.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你告訴治療師你去拜訪了森林樹精，她給了你一個魔力橡果並告訴你製作解除魔法藥水的配方。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Oh, by the way, if you happen to find a ring on your adventures, I lost my favorite gold ring.  I will give a reward to the one who returns it.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「哦，順便說一下，如果你在冒險中碰巧找到戒指，我弄丟了我最喜歡的金戒指。我會給找到它的人獎勵。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Here is the potion of Dispel!
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「這是解除魔法藥水！」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Use it by splashing it on the victim of a magic spell.  Mind you, this won't work if the spell is caused by a magic item; that type of magic can only be removed by taking away the item.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「用它潑在魔法咒語的受害者身上。注意，如果咒語是由魔法物品引起的，這不會起作用；那種魔法只能透過拿走物品來消除。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Please leave me to make the potion, and when you return I shall have it for you.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「請讓我製作藥水，當你回來時我就會為你準備好。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: If you know the ingredients for a Dispel Potion and bring them here, I can make you such a potion.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「如果你知道解除魔法藥水的材料並帶來，我可以為你製作這種藥水。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The Dispel Potion will take a while to make.  Why don't you come back later?
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「解除魔法藥水需要一些時間製作。你何不稍後回來？」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Well, what can I do for you this time?
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「嗯，這次我能為你做什麼？」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: The fragrances of herbs mingle with some rather unpleasant odors as you step into the healer's house.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 當你踏入治療師的房子時，草藥的香氣與一些相當難聞的氣味混合在一起。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: You put the reward away, and tell her she is welcome, as you leave to avoid being kissed again.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 你把獎勵收起來，告訴她不客氣，然後離開以避免再被親吻。

Flowers from Erana's Peace: Lovely day, isn't it?  My, you look very healthy for an adventurer.  You must be new.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「美好的一天，不是嗎？哇，你作為一個冒險家看起來很健康。你一定是新手。」

Flowers from Erana's Peace: What can I do for you?  I can sell you healing potions if you like.
伊瑞娜的安寧之地的鮮花: 「我能為你做什麼？如果你願意，我可以賣你治療藥水。」
